# Cleared For Take-Off Academy

> Cleared For Take-Off is an Australian online academy that teaches everyday adults, and children, to use AI confidently and safely, in plain English, with no hype. Founded by Naomi Shiels (Wild Hearts Publishing).

## Courses
- Self-paced course: six short modules taking a beginner from cautious to a confident weekly AI habit. $49 AUD, lifetime access, Module 1 free to preview. Covers ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Copilot. https://www.clearedfortakeoff.com.au/
- Tailored versions by field: creators, small business, professionals, trades and construction, health and care, non-profits and community, education, hospitality and retail, real estate and property, and later life.
- Kids & Teens (in development): Junior AI Navigators (ages 8 to 11) and Senior AI Pilots (ages 12 to 16), ten weekly lessons each, with credentials. https://www.clearedfortakeoff.com.au/kids-and-teens/

## Key facts
- Price: $49 AUD self-paced, lifetime access, Module 1 free, no payment details to start.
- Audience: complete beginners; plain English; Australian.
- Philosophy: you stay in control ("you are the Captain"); privacy-first; no jargon, no hype.
- Also available: the book "Cleared For Take-Off" ($12.99 AUD) on Amazon, Apple Books, Kobo and Google Play.
